reasoning: The market asks if Bitcoin will dip below $100k before 2026. Given the immediate resolution condition upon any 1-minute candle dipping below $99,999.99, and the fact that Bitcoin is historically highly volatile, it is extremely difficult for BTC to maintain a continuous level above a major psychological barrier like $100k without any single downside wick or correction over a prolonged period (more than 2 months from late October to end of December). Absent real-time price data, baseline crypto volatility strongly suggests a high probability of at least a momentary dip below $100k before year-end, leading to an estimated probability of ~75%.
